# MADS Mobile

Meta · Arsenal · Data · Shooters — the mobile FPS database

A fact-checked, multi-language database of mobile FPS/battle-royale games:
meta/tier rankings, weapon stats, characters & skins, and news, for:

- Call of Duty: Mobile — aka COD Mobile, CODM, Call of Duty Mobile (/madsmobile/{lang}/codm/)
- Free Fire — aka Garena Free Fire, FF, Free Fire MAX (/madsmobile/{lang}/freefire/)
- PUBG Mobile — aka PUBG Mobile, PUBGM, PUBG: Exhilarating Battlefield (/madsmobile/{lang}/pubgm/)
- Delta Force Mobile — aka Delta Force Mobile, Delta Force, DF Mobile, 三角洲行动 (/madsmobile/{lang}/deltaforce/)
- Arena Breakout — aka Arena Breakout, AB, 暗区突围, Arena Breakout Mobile (/madsmobile/{lang}/arenabreakout/)
- Blood Strike (/madsmobile/{lang}/bloodstrike/)

Available languages: en, zh, fr, it, pt, hi, es.
Content is refreshed on a monthly cadence as each game's seasonal updates land.
Weapon tier ratings (S/A/B/C) are editorial assessments based on cited public sources;
see the Sources section on each game and blog page for provenance.
